## Development
When adding anything in the code always run :
```bash
cd "c:\Users\anton\OneDrive\Documents\Polytech Orsay\cours\TAL\Projet\space_vibe\bevy_prototype"; cargo check
```

and if no errors occured :
```bash
cargo run
```

## Documentation
When adding or modifying core functionality, always update the README diagram (`./README.md`) to reflect the change.
